providers.error: OAuth could not be started. Try again.
providers.popupBlocked: Your browser blocked the popup. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
providers.disabled: Auth buttons are disabled because Supabase environment variables are missing.

callback.processingDescription: The OAuth return is being validated, the session is being prepared, and the safe route is being resolved.
callback.retryingDescription: We are trying the flow again with the last provider. Safe redirection will continue shortly.
callback.error: An error occurred during sign in
callback.errorDescription: The OAuth callback could not be completed. Return to the safe landing screen and try again.
callback.disabled: Supabase environment variables are missing, so the callback flow cannot continue.

profileSetup.title: Finish the short profile setup before moving into the product.
profileSetup.subtitle: This is not meant to feel like a barrier. It is only the short setup needed to personalize the rest of the experience.
profileSetup.avatarHint: If your provider already has an avatar, it is imported automatically. You can change it later from settings.
profileSetup.loadingDescription: Required profile fields are being prepared for your first signed-in session.
profileSetup.studentFieldsHint: These fields open only when a student-related status is selected, and stay hidden for other users.

checklist.avatar: The provider avatar can be previewed, but avatar upload is never required here.
checklist.student: School, department, and grade fields appear only after a student-related choice.
checklist.settings: Avatar upload and onboarding replay remain available later from settings.

fields.fullNameHint: This name represents you inside the product shell.
fields.occupationHint: A short and readable role label is enough.
fields.statusHint: Student-specific fields open only when the selection requires them.
fields.schoolHint: Needed only for student or student-and-working profiles.
fields.departmentHint: A short academic department label is enough.
fields.gradeHint: Optional. For example: foundation year, 2nd year, master's.

validation.reviewTitle: Some required fields are still missing
validation.reviewDescription: Review the required fields below. Only the fields relevant to your chosen status are required.

profileSetup.submitError: Profile could not be saved. Please try again.

profilePage.title: Profile and onboarding
profilePage.subtitle: Manage your avatar, required profile fields, and onboarding flow from here.
profilePage.pageAnnouncement: Profile and onboarding settings screen is ready.
profilePage.loadingDescription: Please wait while your profile data is loaded safely.
profilePage.linkDescription: Open avatar, profile details, and onboarding replay settings.
profilePage.avatarHint: Avatar uploads are pushed through Supabase storage.
profilePage.avatarUploadedDescription: The new avatar preview is visible immediately on the profile card.
profilePage.savedDescription: Profile fields were saved with the new values.
profilePage.formDescription: The same logic used during first setup lives here too, while avatar and onboarding controls remain alongside it.

migration.importTitle: Move your local data to the cloud?
migration.importDescription: Planner and tracker records were found on this device after sign-in. If you confirm, the local snapshot is written to Supabase.
migration.conflictDescription: This account already has cloud data. Per the spec, cloud data wins and the local cache is aligned to that copy.
migration.importSuccess: Local data was moved to the cloud
migration.cloudPriorityApplied: Cloud data was applied as the source of truth

dataMigration.title: Move local data to the cloud
dataMigration.description: Planner and tracker data were found on this device. If you confirm, the current local snapshot is pushed to Supabase.
dataMigration.conflictNote: The first release does not auto-merge. If cloud data already exists, that copy is preserved.
dataMigration.cloudFirstRule: When a conflict is detected, cloud data is treated as the source of truth and the local cache is aligned to it.
dataMigration.ownerMismatchToast: Local cache belonged to another account and was cleared safely.
dataMigration.cloudRestoredToast: Cloud data was restored into the local cache.
dataMigration.cloudPriorityToast: Cloud data was applied first and the local cache was updated.
dataMigration.remoteDefaultsToast: Default cloud data was prepared for the new account.
dataMigration.checkErrorToast: Cloud data status could not be checked.
dataMigration.laterToast: Cloud migration can be retried later.
dataMigration.importSuccessToast: Local data was moved to the cloud.
dataMigration.importErrorToast: Local data could not be moved to the cloud.

guard.description: Session, profile, and data bootstrap are being prepared safely.
guard.initialLoadingDescription: Auth state, the current session, and the safe entry surface are being checked together.
guard.redirectPendingDescription: Safe redirection to the selected provider is starting now. The browser will move shortly.
guard.profileLoadingDescription: The profile row is being prepared and required fields are being checked safely.
guard.bootstrapLoadingDescription: Cloud and local bootstrap state are being checked before the app shell is shown.

email.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
email.authError: Failed to send sign-in link. Please try again.
email.linkSentDescription: We sent a sign-in link to:
email.linkInfo: You'll receive an email with a secure sign-in link. Click it to complete sign-in.
